name: Coffee Boys
description: A laid‑back neighborhood coffee shop serving handcrafted espresso drinks, fresh pastries, and locally roasted coffee beans. Known for its cozy atmosphere and friendly baristas.

name: Adopt‑Da Pets
description: A community‑focused pet adoption center helping cats, dogs, and small animals find loving homes. Offers adoption events, pet care resources, and volunteer opportunities.

name: Muscle Maker Fitness
description: A full‑service gym featuring strength training equipment, personal coaching, group fitness classes, and nutrition guidance for beginners and experienced athletes.

name: House of Burgers
address: 77 Grillmaster Lane, Downtown Plaza, Fairview, TX 75020
description: A casual burger joint known for oversized gourmet burgers, crispy fries, and house‑made sauces. Popular for family dining and late‑night cravings.

name: Country Fried Pickles
address: 315 Southern Comfort Road, Suite 5, Oakridge, TX 75017
description: A southern‑style snack shop specializing in crispy fried pickles, loaded appetizers, and comfort food favorites served in a rustic, fun environment.

name: Joe's Candy Land
address: 480 Sweet Street, Candy Corner Plaza, Maplewood, TX 75023
description: A colorful candy store offering classic sweets, chocolate treats, novelty candies, and gift boxes for all ages.

name: Stella's Store of Books
address: 1201 Storybook Avenue, Suite 12, Lakeside Village, TX 75024
description: A charming independent bookstore featuring new releases, rare finds, children’s books, and a cozy reading lounge with regular author events.
